title: About Me
text: Hello! I am Aidan Mistry, a fourth year student currently studnying at Dublin City University. For my first and secind year of school I studied at Brock University in Ontario Canada. Ranging from my thesis to machine learning algorithms this portfolio is a collection of works I’ve developed during my time in college. In my free time I enjoy watching theatre, playing soccer, reading and brain puzzles.

title: About Me
text:
Skills
Here are some of the skills I’ve been able to develop this year * Tech Skills: Python, HTML?CSS, Quarto * Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code

title: About Me
text:
Skills
In all my years of college I have been able to develop skills in * Research * Human Resources * Finance * Marketing * Operations

title: About Me
text:
Goals
My primary goal is to return to Brock University and complete the final courses of my degree. In the long-term I hope to pursue a career in consulting or operations.

title: My Projects
text:
Welcome to my project portfolio. Below you will find examples of my work from College using Python, data analysis, and data visualisation. These projects range from product development, thesis writing, economics and data manipulation and sorting.
